privileged_info_summary: The task is for creating a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) report for property 4815 Ridgeview Trail in Austin, Texas. All data is synthetic, generated within the setup script. The subject property is located at 4815 Ridgeview Trail (not just '4815 Ridgeview' as metadata claims). Agent Sarah Chen from Lone Star Realty Group is the realtor. Six comparable sales are provided: Greystone Drive ($698k), Mesa Drive ($715k), Highland Terrace ($672k), Balcones Drive ($725k), Shoal Creek Boulevard ($689k), and Far West Boulevard ($705k). The recommended listing price range is $685,000-$710,000. The document must include at least 5 Heading 1 sections, 4 Heading 2 subsections, 2 tables, a table of contents, and page numbers in the footer.
